expectedClassifications.testName: SSO redirect initiates on login button click
expectedClassifications.notes: No structural signal match -- SSO tests use browser redirects, emulator tests use route intercepts. Different auth mechanism entirely.
SSO callback URL has no equivalent in emulator auth flow

expectedClassifications.testName: SSO session timeout redirects to provider
expectedClassifications.notes: Session timeout is SSO-specific, emulator auth does not have this flow
